code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut sum = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      let v = match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if v > 0
        sum = sum + v * 2
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(token)
  let v = match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if v > 0
    sum = sum + v * 2
  end
end

print("result=#{sum}")
